automl-coordinator.description: AutoML project coordinator that orchestrates data processing, feature engineering, model selection, and validation

data-processor.description: Data cleaning and preprocessing specialist - handles missing values, outliers, data type conversion

feature-engineer.description: Feature engineering and selection specialist - creates, transforms, and selects features for ML

model-selector.description: Model selection and hyperparameter optimization specialist - finds optimal ML model and params

model-validator.description: Model validation and performance evaluation specialist - cross-validation, metrics, model comparison

explainability.description: Model interpretability and SHAP analysis specialist - explains model predictions with SHAP values

viz-agent.description: Visualization specialist - creates charts, maps, and ML plots. Uses data-visualization and geospatial-analysis skills
